queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of negative checking account balances on increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical determinants of credit risk associated with the absence of a checking account and elevated default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Empirical evidence on the mitigating effect of loan purposes for used car purchases on credit risk exposure.
